calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder Abuse/Dependent Adult TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Temp: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722, Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Certified Law Student Nikki Dinh supervised by Heidi Li, Esq. for Petitioner: Xiang Liang, also present and assisted by Court Certified Interpreter Amy Lo with English/Cantonese translation.

James P. Green, Esq. for Respondent: Shan Shan Wong, also present

The parties were sworn.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person: Xing Liang and her Person/Residence/Vehicle. At the Saint Paul of the Shipwreck Catholic Church, the church where both parties attend the food bank, there is a no contact/stay away of 5 yards. Ms. Wong is not to contact Ms. Liang.

Respondent shall not Harass, Attack, Strike, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

Expires: September 2, 2012.

The order was signed in open court.

NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Aug-24-2009 Reset To Sep-02-09 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
